title: Home IDS 🛡️ Tier 2: Engine System Health & Performance

options.content: ### 🧭 [Triage Hub](/d/ids-master-hub-v2) | [📊 DNS & ML Diagnostics](/d/ids-dns-ml/tier-2-threat-id-dns-ml-diagnostics?var-device=${device}) | [🔒 Network & Lateral (Zeek NDR)](/d/ids-ndr/tier-2-threat-id-network-lateral-zeek-ndr?var-device=${device}) | [🌍 GeoIP & OSINT Intel](/d/ids-geo/tier-2-threat-id-geoip-osint-intel?var-device=${device}) | **⚙️ Engine System Health**

panels.title: 📖 Analyst Field Guide: Core Processing Latency & DB Backpressure

options.content:
#### ⏳ Database Lag & Events Ingest Velocity
* **What this monitors:** Evaluates the synchronization speed between the Pi-hole SQLite Write-Ahead Log (WAL) transaction stream and our core Python evaluation thread.
* **🟢 Normal State:** Lag stays strictly under 2.0 seconds. The line graph should mirror your local network traffic trends smoothly.
* **🔴 Problem State:** If the lag begins climbing in a diagonal line, the SQLite database may be locked, or the script is experiencing compute starvation.

panels.title: SQLite Transaction Event Processing Ingest Velocity
📖 Analyst Field Guide: Memory Allocations & Stability Matrices

options.content:
#### 🧠 Python Runtime Footprint & Stabilization
* **What this monitors:** Tracks the actual RAM occupied by the IDS daemon process (Resident Set Size).
* **🟢 Normal State:** A stable "sawtooth" pattern or a completely flat horizontal bar. This confirms that our size-capped dictionaries are successfully evicting old states and keeping RAM use constrained.
* **🔴 Problem State:** A continuous, unmitigated upward diagonal line signifies a severe memory leak, meaning a data structure is storing parameters indefinitely without pruning.

panels.title: 📖 Analyst Field Guide: Alert Delivery & Notification Pipeline Reliability

options.content:
#### ✉️ Notification Queue Retries & Drops
* **What this monitors:** Validates the operational status of our out-of-band Telegram alert engine.
* **🟢 Normal State:** The alert backlog queue sits firmly at 0. Successful alert processing increments cleanly.
* **🔴 Problem State:** If the alert queue rises alongside metric retry ticks, the system is actively backing off due to Telegram API rate-limiting (HTTP 429) or an internet drop, preserving alerts in host RAM until connectivity recovers.
